metadata.description: SRE incident root-cause analysis skills for Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: sre-agent
plugins.description: Host-agnostic SRE incident root-cause agent for intake, evidence collection, grading, and reports.

plugins.name: sre-onboarding
plugins.description: Service onboarding skills for discovering service identity, dependencies, infrastructure, observability surfaces, and operational context.

plugins.name: livesite-agent
plugins.description: Fast breadth-first livesite monitoring coordinator. Watches live telemetry for the earliest signal of a service or binary issue or release regression, ranks burst anomalies, dispatches per-candidate confirm/refute subagents, and emits an alert draft.
